name: Plum Sauced Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork spare ribs into serving pieces.
2. Simmer the ribs in water for one hour.
3. Combine soy sauce, plum jam, honey, orange juice, and garlic in a bowl.
4. Baste the ribs with the sauce before placing them back into the simmering liquid.
5. Cover the pot with aluminum foil.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 30 minutes, basting every 10 minutes.
